name: Protective Asset Allocation Full Universe + 30% Vol Target
description: Keller & Keuning PAA across all 12 risky assets plus VUTY bonds as the safe asset, scaled to 30% annualised volatility. Trend-filters 12 assets and allocates defensively to bonds when assets fall below their SMA; the 30% vol target provides more room for upside capture compared to the 15% variant.
